headline: Explore the S&P500 index on Friday and find out which stocks are the most active in today's session.
summary: Curious about the most active S&P500 stocks in today's session? Join us as we explore the US markets on Friday and uncover the stocks that are leading the way in terms of trading volume and market attention.
